base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of soldier_run — a character (minion) from 1987 contra. Red-shirt foot-soldier — runs left/right firing, 3-frame cycle. Most common Stage 1 enemy. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Red-shirt foot-soldier — runs left/right firing, 3-frame cycle. Most common Stage 1 enemy
